description: CompositionBlack suede leather shoes with mesh upper, contrast white lace loops, multi directional rubber outsole and hevily cushioned backsoleWash care1. Remove dust with soft, clean, damp cloth2. Do not machine washInspired by outdoor fashion, these suede leather shoes from adidas change your body language and make a very strong style statement. The suede leather mesh upper ensures your feet are well ventilated, while you paint the city with your style. The suede leather adds a wild edge to your outfit, while the cushioned sockliner and mesh upper ensures ample comfort and ventilation. With multi-directional rubber soles for that ultimate grip and support, coupled with a heavily cushioned backsole, these shoes are perfect for adventure trips.
